summary: Tested merged Collections admin tabs (Collection Manager, Collection Mapping, Collections Page Settings) into unified CollectionsHub interface. All features working correctly: 3 tabs with Shadcn Tabs, tab switching works, embedded prop hides headers, standalone routes still work independently, WebsiteHub shows consolidated Collections card, Sidebar shows Collections link.

/admin/collections route loads Collectio.details: CollectionsHub component loads with data-testid='collections-hub', header shows 'Collections' with description

Collection Manager tab shows collection.details: Shows 391 collections with images, search input, stats (Total Collections, Featured, Custom Images, Hidden), Grid/Reorder toggle, Card Settings, Refresh button

Collection Mapping tab shows create coll.details: Shows 'New Collection' button and empty state 'No Collections Yet' with 'Create Collection' CTA

Page Settings tab shows hero banner edit.details: Shows product group selector (Tiles, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories, Underfloor Heating), Hero Banners/Room Quick Links/Popular Filters tabs, live preview, Save Changes button

Tab switching between all 3 tabs.details: Clicking tabs switches content correctly, each tab loads its respective component

Standalone /admin/collection-manager rou.details: Route works independently, shows its own header 'Collection Manager' (embedded=false)

Standalone /admin/collection-mapping rou.details: Route works independently, shows its own header 'Collection Mapping' (embedded=false)

Standalone /admin/collections-page-setti.details: Route works independently, shows its own header 'Collections Page Settings' (embedded=false)

WebsiteHub shows consolidated Collection.details: Collections card in 'Navigation & Structure' section links to /admin/collections with description 'Manage images, product mappings & page settings for collections'

Sidebar shows Collections link.details: Sidebar under Website section has 'Collections' link pointing to /admin/collections, clicking navigates correctly

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - existing collections data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: CollectionsHub at /admin/collections consolidates 3 collection management pages into tabs. The embedded prop controls whether child components show their own headers. Standalone routes (/admin/collection-manager, /admin/collection-mapping, /admin/collections-page-settings) still work independently. WebsiteHub and Sidebar both link to the new consolidated /admin/collections route.
